description:
A chemical warehouse with a water-filled containment basin needs a spill response plan. Determine the physical layering order of Carbon Tetrachloride, Toluene, Chloroform, n-Hexane, Carbon Disulfide, and water (SG 1.00) based on their Specific Gravity (SG) found via CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Record the predicted layering from BOTTOM (highest SG) to TOP (lowest SG) in /home/ga/Desktop/spill_layering_results.txt.

Format each line as:
Layer 1 (Bottom): [Chemical Name] - SG: [Value]
Layer 2: [Chemical Name] - SG: [Value]
Layer 3: [Chemical Name] - SG: [Value]
Layer 4: [Chemical Name] - SG: [Value]
Layer 5: [Chemical Name] - SG: [Value]
Layer 6 (Top): [Chemical Name] - SG: [Value]
